title: Event Highlights | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Event Highlights
Sep 27 2019Language Festival Explores Identity and Translation at Transnational UniversitiesEducators and students from across the region gathered at NYU Shanghai for the campus's first language festival.Conference & Symposium
May 30 2019NYU Shanghai Breaks Ground on New CampusNYU Shanghai broke ground today on a new 114,000 square meter campus to open in 2022.The New Bund Campus
Apr 12 2019NYU Shanghai Students Will Represent China at L’ORÉAL Competition World Finals in Paris A team of sophomores has been named National Champions for China in a global branding and marketing competition.Student
Mar 15 2019 I Am Limitless Conference Shows Students Possibilities of Social Impact WorkProfessionals from across China shared expertise with students about how to effect change in the world.Conference & Symposium
Mar 1 2019French Consul General Visits NYU ShanghaiAxel Cruau talks EU’s future, importance of “global mindset” during visit to NYU Shanghai.Talks
Feb 22 2019“ROOM 100” Reopens: A Gallery, a Classroom, and More After a two year hiatus, the NYU Shanghai Art Gallery has reopened with a new Director and new ambitions.Gallery
Dec 7 2018Michelle Kwan on Pivoting on and off the IceFigure skating legend Michelle Kwan spent the day with our students and shared insights on her remarkable career.Talks
Nov 30 2018Foreign Experts and the Making of Global ChinaHistorian Julian Gewirtz unfolded the history of China's reform and opening-up on November 28.Community
Nov 21 2018The Volatility Institute at NYU Shanghai Hosts Fourth Annual Conference About 200 scholars and economists gathered at NYU Shanghai for the Fourth VINS Annual Conference on November 17. Conference & Symposium
Nov 8 2018Former Chinese Trade Negotiator and WTO Judge Joins U.S. Business Leader for Dialogue on World TradeOn November 7, Zhang Yuejiao, former chief trade negotiator for China and former WTO judge spoke at NYU Shanghai.Talks
Sep 14 2018Liu Cixin Demystifies Sci-Fi WritingIn a rare public appearance, award-winning science fiction writer Liu Cixin joined arts professor Sheldon Brown Talks
Sep 12 2018Kai-Fu Lee At NYU Shanghai: Love Is What Differentiates Us From AIAI may be reshaping the world, but compassion and strategic thinking will remain in demand, Talks
Jun 27 2018Cutting-Edge Sciences: Brain-Computer Interface & Cancer ImmunotherapyOn June 10, NYU Shanghai hosted the 41st Future Lecture Series, bringing AI industry professionals, medical researchers, computer scientists and medical researchers together to discuss the cutting-edge science of brain-computer interface and how artificialConference & Symposium
On June 10, NYU Shanghai hosted the 41st Future Lecture Series, bringing AI industry professionals, medical researchers, computer scientists and medical researchers together to discuss the cutting-edge science of brain-computer interface and how artificial
Jun 13 2018Business Embraces Knowledge SharingOn June 9, NYU Shanghai’s inaugural forum on KnowledgeSharingandtheIdeasIndustry hosted pundits, academics, and leading entrepreneurs who analyzed the explosive growth of online knConference & Symposium
On June 9, NYU Shanghai’s inaugural forum on KnowledgeSharingandtheIdeasIndustry hosted pundits, academics, and leading entrepreneurs who analyzed the explosive growth of online kn
May 23 2018NYU Shanghai Honors the Class of 2018 NYU Shanghai has held its commencement ceremony for the Class of 2018 at the Shanghai Oriental Arts Center.Commencement
